salmanshh_simple_health.name: Simple Health
salmanshh_simple_health.description: A complete health management behavior for Construct 3 with damage, healing, and death detection.

maxHealth.name: Max Health
maxHealth.desc: Initial maximum health for instances with this behavior.

destroyOnDeath.name: Destroy on Death
destroyOnDeath.desc: Destroy the instance when it dies.

Heal.description: Increase health by the specified amount (up to max health).

Revive.description: Revive the instance and restore it to max health.

SetHealth.description: Set the instance's current health (clamped between 0 and max).

SetHealthAbsorptionRate.description: Set the multiplier applied to damage that reaches real health. 1.0 = normal, 0.5 = 50% damage taken (resistance), 2.0 = double damage taken (vulnerability), 0 = immune.

rate.name: Rate
rate.desc: Damage multiplier for real health (e.g. 0.5 = half damage taken, 2.0 = double damage taken).

SetInvulnerable.description: Set whether the instance is invulnerable to damage.

state.name: Invulnerable
state.desc: True to make invulnerable, false to allow damage.

TakeDamage.description: Reduce health by the specified amount.

amount.name: Amount
amount.desc: The amount of damage to take.

AddTempHealth.description: Add to a named temporary health pool.

type.name: Type
type.desc: Name of the temporary health pool (e.g. "shield", "armour").

amount.name: Amount
amount.desc: The amount of temporary health to add.

ClearAllTempHealth.description: Remove all temporary health from every named pool.

ClearTempHealth.description: Remove all temporary health from a named pool.

type.name: Type
type.desc: Name of the temporary health pool to clear.

SetTempHealth.description: Set a named temporary health pool to a specific value.

type.name: Type
type.desc: Name of the temporary health pool (e.g. "shield", "armour").

SetTempHealthAbsorptionRate.display-text: Set {0} temp health absorption rate to {1}
SetTempHealthAbsorptionRate.description: Set how much of a named pool is consumed per 1 point of incoming damage. 1.0 = equal, 0.5 = armour-style (1 dmg costs 0.5 armour), 2.0 = fragile shield.

type.name: Type
type.desc: Name of the temporary health pool.

rate.name: Rate
rate.desc: Temp health cost per 1 point of damage (e.g. 0.5 = armour-style).

SetTempHealthDecayRate.display-text: Set {0} temp health decay rate to {1} per second
SetTempHealthDecayRate.description: Set how much a named temporary health pool drains per second. 0 disables decay.

type.name: Type
type.desc: Name of the temporary health pool.

rate.name: Rate
rate.desc: Temporary health lost per second (0 = no decay).

SetTempHealthPriority.display-text: Set {0} temp health pool priority to {1}
SetTempHealthPriority.description: Set the damage-absorption priority for a named pool. Lower numbers are consumed first. Default is 0. Use this to reorder existing pools without changing their amounts or rates.

type.name: Type
type.desc: Name of the temporary health pool.

priority.name: Priority
priority.desc: Damage absorption priority. Lower numbers are consumed first.

SetTempHealthRates.description: Set both the decay rate (HP lost per second) and absorption rate (temp HP cost per 1 damage) for a named pool in one action.

type.name: Type
type.desc: Name of the temporary health pool.

decayRate.name: Decay rate
decayRate.desc: Temporary health lost per second (0 = no decay).

absorptionRate.name: Absorption rate
absorptionRate.desc: Temp health cost per 1 point of damage (1.0 = equal, 0.5 = armour-style).

SetupTempHealthPool.display-text: Setup {0} temp health | amount {1} | decay {2}s | absorption {3} | priority {4}
SetupTempHealthPool.description: Fully configure a named temporary health pool in one action — sets the amount, decay rate, absorption rate, and priority together.

type.name: Type
type.desc: Name of the temporary health pool (e.g. "shield", "armour").

amount.name: Amount
amount.desc: The temporary health value to set.

decayRate.name: Decay rate
decayRate.desc: Temporary health lost per second (0 = no decay).

absorptionRate.name: Absorption rate
absorptionRate.desc: Temp health cost per 1 point of damage (1.0 = equal, 0.5 = armour-style).

priority.name: Priority
priority.desc: Damage absorption priority. Lower numbers are consumed first. Default 0.

IsDead.description: True if the instance is dead (health is 0).

IsInvulnerable.description: True if the instance is currently invulnerable to damage.

OnDamaged.description: Trigger when the instance takes damage.

OnHealed.description: Trigger when the instance is healed.

HasAnyTempHealth.description: True if any temporary health pool has health remaining.

HasTempHealth.description: True if a specific named temporary health pool has any health remaining.

type.name: Type
type.desc: Name of the temporary health pool to check.

IsTempHealthType.description: True if the temporary health pool that fired the last trigger matches the given type name. Use inside 'On temp health depleted' or 'On temp health absorbed damage' to filter by pool.

type.name: Type
type.desc: The pool name to match against the last triggered pool.

OnTempHealthAbsorbed.description: Triggers when temporary health intercepts incoming damage (even partially).

OnTempHealthDepleted.description: Triggers when temporary health reaches zero (from damage or time decay).

HealthAbsorptionRate.description: The current damage multiplier applied to real health. 1.0 = normal, 0.5 = resistance, 2.0 = vulnerability.

HealthPercent.description: Current health as a percentage of max health.

LastTempDamageAbsorbed.description: The amount of incoming damage intercepted by temporary health on the last hit.

LastTempHealthType.description: The name of the temporary health pool that fired the most recent 'On temp health depleted' or 'On temp health absorbed damage' trigger.

TempHealth.description: Current temporary health of a named pool.

type.name: Type
type.desc: Name of the temporary health pool.

TempHealthAbsorptionRate.description: Temp health cost per 1 point of incoming damage for a named pool (absorption rate). 1.0 = equal, 0.5 = armour-style.

type.name: Type
type.desc: Name of the temporary health pool.

TempHealthDecayRate.description: Temporary health lost per second for a named pool (time-based decay rate).

type.name: Type
type.desc: Name of the temporary health pool.

TempHealthPriority.description: Damage absorption priority of the named pool. Lower numbers are consumed first. Returns 0 if the pool does not exist.

type.name: Type
type.desc: Name of the temporary health pool.
